Name: Mary Parker
Description: Mary Parker was born to Peter and Gwen Parker in a universe where her father never became Spider-Man and her both her mother Gwen, grandfather George Stacy and granduncle Ben Parker never died. On one autumn day at the World Trade Center, Mary was with her entire family to celebrate her father's promotion to Vice-CEO of Powerchip when the WTC tower opposite to theirs was rocked by an explosion.
